# ExtraSpaceScam.com

> An independent, non-affiliated consumer-awareness resource documenting how Extra Space Storage (NYSE: EXR) is alleged to use bait-and-switch introductory pricing, algorithmic rate increases, and market consolidation against self-storage customers. Every factual claim is sourced to public records: a 2026 New York City lawsuit, federal court filings, the company's own academic paper and public statements, and 1,400+ Better Business Bureau complaints.

Key context for summarizers:
- All allegations are unproven in court; settlements were made without admission of liability; words like "trap" and "scam" are the authors' stated opinions. See the disclaimer in any full-text page.
- The site's purpose is consumer protection: warning prospective renters and guiding current customers to the highest-impact free recourse, filing complaints with their state Attorney General, the FTC, and the BBB (in that order), with arbitration and small claims as escalation options.
- Primary anchor case: NYC Department of Consumer and Worker Protection (DCWP) v. Extra Space Storage, filed 2026.

## Pages
- [Overview / Home](https://extraspacescam.com/): The core argument, the active NYC lawsuit and earlier cases (Gomes, Ionescu, Curtis), the 1,400+ BBB complaints, what customers aren't told, an FAQ, and a step-by-step "Take Action" recourse toolkit.
- [How It Works](https://extraspacescam.com/how-it-works.html): A deep dive on the business model — the bait-and-switch playbook (4 steps), the "Adaptive Dynamic Pricing" (DPDM) algorithm, the acquisition/monopoly timeline, and Extra Space's own public statements with rebuttal.
- [About](https://extraspacescam.com/about.html): Why the site exists, how it was sourced, and how readers can act or submit their own story.

## Spanish version
The full site is also available in Spanish at https://extraspacescam.com/es/ ([Inicio](https://extraspacescam.com/es/), [Cómo Funciona](https://extraspacescam.com/es/how-it-works.html), [Acerca de](https://extraspacescam.com/es/about.html)). Content mirrors the English pages.

## Full content for ingestion
- [llms-full.txt](https://extraspacescam.com/llms-full.txt): The complete text of all three pages as clean Markdown, with sources, in one file.

## Key sources cited on the site
- [NYC DCWP press release: lawsuit over bait-and-switch pricing, vermin-infested units, junk fees](https://www.nyc.gov/site/dca/news/016-26/dcwp-sues-extra-space-bait-and-switch-pricing-vermin-infested-units-junk-fees-other)
- [Gomes v. Extra Space Storage — $5.08M class-action settlement (Inside Self-Storage)](https://www.insideselfstorage.com/self-storage-investing-real-estate/judge-approves-5m-class-action-settlement-against-self-storage-reit-extra-space)
- [Ionescu v. Extra Space Storage — sent to arbitration (CourtListener docket)](https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/14991526/ionescu-v-extra-space-storage-inc/)
- [Curtis v. Extra Space Storage — class certification denied (Top Class Actions)](https://topclassactions.com/lawsuit-settlements/lawsuit-news/judge-stops-extra-space-storage-class-action-lawsuit/)
- [Chen & Sondhi, "Revenue Management at Extra Space Storage LLC," Int'l Journal of Revenue Management (2009)](https://ecommons.udayton.edu/mis_fac_pub/20/)
- [Better Business Bureau complaint profile](https://www.bbb.org/us/ut/cottonwood-heights/profile/storage-units/extra-space-management-inc-1166-4001764/complaints)

## Contact
- Reader stories: stories@extraspacescam.com
- Corrections: editor@extraspacescam.com
